source: Anthropic claude-api reference (model table cached 2026-06-04); cache write = 1.25x input (5m TTL) / 2x input (1h TTL); cache read = 0.1x input (prompt-caching economics). Rates are committed so Phase 7 can recompute cost from raw usage even after public prices change.
notes: cache_creation_input_tokens is priced at cacheWrite5m by default (the API's default TTL); the exact 5m/1h split, when prompt caching is enabled (a likely Phase 8 optimization), comes from the verbatim usage breakdown stored on each llm_decision event.
